_meta.description: Compliance section reference input nodes (S13 Mechanical). 7 inputs injected from the Reference model via REF_OUTPUT_TO_TARGET_INPUT mapping. These have non-zero defaults representing code minimum values for HVAC equipment performance.

instances.label: Reference AFUE
instances.note: Annual fuel utilization efficiency code minimum. Mapped from Reference output mechanical.heating.afue.

instances.label: Reference HSPF
instances.note: Heating seasonal performance factor code minimum. Mapped from Reference output mechanical.heating.hspf.

instances.label: Reference Cooling COP
instances.note: Cooling coefficient of performance code minimum. Mapped from Reference output mechanical.cooling.copDedicated.

instances.label: Reference Cooling Intensity
instances.note: Reference cooling energy intensity. Used INVERTED in compliance ratio (ref/target).

instances.label: Reference SRE
instances.note: Sensible recovery efficiency code minimum (%). Mapped from Reference output mechanical.ventilation.efficiency.

instances.label: Reference Ventilation Rate
instances.note: Ventilation rate per person code minimum. Mapped from Reference output mechanical.ventilation.ratePerPerson.

instances.label: Reference Mechanical Cooling Days
instances.note: Reference mechanical cooling days. Used in free cooling compliance check.

signature.inputs: These ARE the inputs (registered via graph.registerInput in ComplianceNodes.js). Populated by REF_OUTPUT_TO_TARGET_INPUT mapping.
signature.output: Values stored in Target model's MultiModelState, consumed by compliance ratio computations (m_113-m_119, n_124)

invariants.condition: Non-zero defaults represent code minimum values
invariants.description: AFUE=0.92, HSPF=12.5, COP=2.66, SRE=55%, ventRate=10 L/s/person are typical code baselines

invariants.condition: Compliance ratios are (target/ref)*100 except cooling intensity which is INVERTED (ref/target)*100
invariants.description: Lower cooling intensity is better, so ratio is inverted

behavior.condition: Reference model computes and REF_OUTPUT_TO_TARGET_INPUT copies values
behavior.output: Target model recomputes compliance ratios and pass/fail status nodes
behavior.note: Each ratio has a companion pass/fail node (n_113, n_115, etc.)
